attributes.title: [Azure Application Gateway OTel] Backend Health
attributes.description: Backend pool health derived from `ApplicationGatewayAccessLog` records: per-pool latency percentiles, backend status distribution, per-instance balance, slowest URLs, and the gateway-vs-backend latency split. If `ApplicationGatewayPerformanceLog` records become available (Application Gateway v1 SKU), they may augment this view; this content pack does not depend on them.
